result.evidence_summary: No evidence of a 'Porvoo Ski Marathon' cross-country ski race found in any search results. Mentions of cross-country skiing in Porvoo refer only to general lighted trails and local clubs, with no specific marathon event, official site, results, news, or listings in Worldloppet/Euroloppet/Ski Classics. Other events like Porvoo Race (likely cycling) and running marathons exist, but no ski marathon.
